# @nx-safe-suite/env

> Strict, type-safe environment variable validation for Next.js, powered by Zod.

## Status

🚧 Work in progress — part of the [next-safe-suite](../../README.md) monorepo. API not yet stable.

## Installation

```bash
pnpm add @nx-safe-suite/env
```

## Usage

```ts
import "@nx-safe-suite/env";
```
